description: Validation gates per UXC contract layer. Activation Surface uses these to validate surface briefs and built artifacts.

validation_gates.name: State declaration required
validation_gates.check: Surface must declare one of: idle | validating | processing | complete | partial_complete | failed

validation_gates.name: Required fields present
validation_gates.check: state, confidence, validation_status, next_action must all be present in operator-facing outputs

validation_gates.name: Invalid transition blocked
validation_gates.check: No state may transition to a non-adjacent state in the IMS state machine

validation_gates.name: Output structure compliance
validation_gates.check: All new LLM outputs must contain: what_happened, why_it_matters, what_to_do_next

validation_gates.name: No direct API bypass
validation_gates.check: All LLM calls must route through stardance-llm-service — no direct api.anthropic.com calls

validation_gates.name: calling_system declared
validation_gates.check: Every LLM invocation must declare calling_system field

validation_gates.name: DRJ gate before first LLM call
validation_gates.check: DRJ gate must be confirmed before any new system makes its first LLM call

validation_gates.name: Five visibility requirements
validation_gates.check: All five SVS visibility requirements must be exposed on operator-facing surfaces

validation_gates.name: Hidden state violation
validation_gates.check: No state may be hidden, inferred, or presented ambiguously

validation_gates.name: Canonical type vocabulary
validation_gates.check: All components must use only the 13 canonical CBC types

validation_gates.name: Design doctrine compliance
validation_gates.check: Surface must demonstrate: Clarity → Flow → Delight → Conviction

validation_gates.name: UIS/CBC boundary respected
validation_gates.check: CBC governs behaviour semantics only. UIS governs aesthetic expression. No cross-layer contamination.

validation_gates.name: Confidence display
validation_gates.check: FLAG-B01 score and band (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) must be visible. 0.92 cap acknowledged.

validation_gates.name: Ethics gate visibility
validation_gates.check: Ethics gate blocks must identify category (VS-001/002/003 or PCC-001/002/003/004) — not just 'blocked'

validation_gates.name: Theme declaration
validation_gates.check: Surface must declare a valid theme from theme_registry.json

validation_gates.name: Mode declaration
validation_gates.check: Surface must declare a valid mode: vibe | dark | light. 'classic' is deprecated.

validation_gates.name: Grid rule compliance
validation_gates.check: Theme count must equal mode count. 3x3 canonical.

validation_gates.name: Creative differentiation mandate
validation_gates.check: Surface must meet 3 of 4 criteria: Motion, Depth, Character, Memory

validation_gates.name: Tier 3A gate
validation_gates.check: Cinematic hero (CBC-01) required for all creator-facing surfaces. DRJ approval required.

severity_definitions.block: Surface cannot proceed to next lifecycle state without resolving this gate
severity_definitions.flag: Surface is flagged for review but may proceed. Must be resolved before drj_locked state.
severity_definitions.note: Informational only. Does not prevent progression.
